profile.name: Shantanu Sadafale
profile.title: Full-Stack Developer
profile.tagline: React • Node • AWS • Delivery & Logistics Platforms

projects.title: Mangwale Search API v2.0
projects.summary: Self-hosted, module-aware search engine powering product and store discovery across all Mangwale modules — full-text, semantic vector search (KNN/HNSW), and geospatial filtering.
projects.description: Self-hosted, module-aware cross-marketplace search engine powering product and store discovery across all Mangwale modules (Food, E-commerce, Grocery, Pharmacy, Pet Care). Combines full-text search, AI-powered semantic search, and geospatial filtering with intelligent ranking. Integrated into the Flutter MangwaleUser app for real-time search across the customer marketplace.
features: 20+ search endpoints supporting full-text, semantic vector (HNSW/KNN), category-based, and geospatial distance/zone-based search
Python-based embedding microservice for generating vector embeddings powering semantic similarity search
Intelligent time-based ranking (breakfast/lunch/dinner boosting) and trending score calculation from order velocity
Two-tier caching system (in-memory L1 + Redis L2) with geo-bucketed cache keys for low-latency responses
MySQL-to-OpenSearch sync pipeline computing popularity, quality, and trending scores
Search event logging to ClickHouse for analytics, trending query detection, and search behavior tracking

projects.title: Dispatcher Portal & Enterprise Dashboard
projects.tagline: Full-stack delivery management & B2B API platform
projects.summary: React dispatcher dashboard and NestJS API — multi-provider logistics (Porter, LoadShare, Mangwale), live tracking, and business.mangwale.com B2B portal with API keys, wallet, and invoices.
projects.description: Full-stack logistics dispatch platform and B2B enterprise self-service dashboard served as a dual-domain React + NestJS application. Dispatcher portal manages real-time order lifecycle with live rider tracking on Leaflet maps, multi-stop dispatch, OTP validation, and automated 3PL routing. Enterprise dashboard enables B2B clients to place orders via API, manage prepaid wallets, download PDF invoices, and generate API keys.
projects.quote: One platform. Multi-provider logistics. Enterprise-ready API.
features: NestJS backend with modular architecture: orders, live-tracking, enterprise accounts, webhooks, delivery pricing, 3PL plugin adapters
Enterprise B2B API platform with API key issuance, rate limiting, Razorpay wallet recharge (UPI QR), and Puppeteer PDF invoice generation
Dual-database architecture (PostgreSQL + MySQL read mirror) with session-based authentication and PostgreSQL session store
Multi-provider logistics: Porter, LoadShare, Mangwale (unified getQuote, createOrder, cancel, track)
NGINX dual-domain TLS reverse proxy deployed to AWS EC2

projects.title: Rider Partner App
projects.summary: Full-stack rider platform — React Native mobile app, React WebView hybrid, PWA — real-time order management, GPS tracking, earnings wallet, and withdrawals.
projects.description: Full-stack rider platform for onboarding, real-time order management, GPS tracking, earnings wallet, and withdrawals. Includes a React Native mobile app (Mangwale Rider Partner) built from scratch, a React WebView hybrid variant, and a browser PWA — all powered by the partner.mangwale.com NestJS backend. Also includes an admin panel for KYC approval, shipment management, and zone configuration.
features: React Native mobile app from scratch with rider onboarding, real-time order management, GPS tracking, and earnings withdrawal
50+ TypeORM migrations covering riders, shipments, multi-stop orders, KYC documents, attendance, GPS history, earnings wallet, rate cards, and zones
Real-time order offer system using Socket.io WebSocket gateway with Firebase FCM fallback
GPS proximity-based OTP delivery confirmation (configurable 100m radius) and earnings model with paisa-level integer precision
React WebView hybrid bridge with custom DOM events for native navigation

projects.title: Helper Portal
projects.tagline: Order management, voice calls, and QR generation
projects.summary: Helper portal for order management, Exotel voice calls, QR code generation with Node Canvas, and push notifications with dynamic SMS gateway selection.
projects.description: Helper portal for order management and other micro-services, Exotel voice calls, QR code generation, and push notifications. Built custom QR template engine using Node Canvas and Sharp with configurable backgrounds, fonts, borders, and colors.
features: Custom QR template engine using Node Canvas and Sharp with configurable backgrounds, fonts, borders, and colors
Exotel voice calling API with full call logging (SID, status, duration) to PostgreSQL
OTP-based vendor authentication and dynamic SMS gateway configurable from database at runtime
Containerized frontend and backend with Docker Compose behind NGINX on AWS EC2

projects.title: Mangwale Customer Marketplace
projects.tagline: Multi-module marketplace for food, grocery, parcel & rentals
projects.summary: Customer marketplace for food, grocery, parcel, and vehicle rental. Next.js SSR web app + Flutter mobile apps. Firebase social auth, full e-commerce flows, and multi-language support.
projects.description: Customer marketplace for food, grocery, parcel, and vehicle rental. Next.js SSR web app + Flutter mobile apps (MangwaleUser v3.3/v3.4). Firebase social auth (Google, Facebook, Apple), full e-commerce flows, i18next multi-language with RTL support, Redux Persist state management, and Google Maps address management.
features: Multi-module marketplace with server-side rendering for SEO (food, grocery, parcel, rental verticals)
Flutter customer mobile apps (MangwaleUser v3.3 and v3.4) with feature parity to web platform
Full e-commerce flows: cart, multi-step checkout with Google Maps address selection, coupon and cashback systems
Firebase social authentication (Google, Facebook, Apple) with i18next multi-language and RTL support
Flutter vendor mobile app (VendorApp v3.5) for store owners with order management and push notifications

projects.title: Driphunter Admin Panel
projects.tagline: E-commerce admin with social media automation
projects.summary: E-commerce admin portal for a fashion brand with automated Instagram/Facebook product syncing and Shiprocket/Bluedart shipping integration.
projects.description: E-commerce admin portal for a fashion brand with product, collection, and order management. Automated social media and shipping workflows. Built complete admin panel from scratch with automated Instagram and Facebook product syncing, and integrated Shiprocket and Bluedart shipping APIs for automated order fulfillment.
features: Complete admin panel from scratch with product, collection, and order management
Automated Instagram and Facebook product syncing and content publishing
Shiprocket and Bluedart shipping APIs for automated order fulfillment and real-time tracking
Reduced manual operations by 40%

projects.title: SportzSaaga E-Commerce Platform
projects.tagline: Niche e-commerce for carrom boards & accessories
projects.summary: Full e-commerce platform with Razorpay payments, multi-provider shipping, and Amazon listing sync. Increased online sales by 30% QoQ.
projects.description: Niche e-commerce platform for carrom boards and accessories with full shopping flows and multi-provider payment and shipping integration. Built complete e-commerce platform from scratch with product catalog, cart, checkout, and Amazon product listing sync. Integrated Razorpay payments and Shiprocket/Bluedart shipping.
projects.quote: From niche to scale — e-commerce done right.
features: Complete e-commerce platform from scratch with product catalog, cart, and checkout
Razorpay payment integration with multiple payment methods
Shiprocket and Bluedart shipping integration for automated fulfillment
Amazon product listing sync for cross-platform sales
30% quarter-on-quarter increase in online sales
